problem: Prod correlation result is absent or not ready on the first read.
observed_pattern: A forum code post reports an empty initial retrieval and retries. This supports an explicit PENDING/UNAVAILABLE state and a bounded retry policy, not the published request implementation.
preconditions: A future human-authorized read adapter exists.
The request has a correlation-result identity and audit record.
failure_cases: Result remains unavailable after the bounded attempt budget.
Server status is ambiguous or missing.
security_risk: The source contains session and direct-platform logic; do not copy it or expose it.
recommended_pattern: Persist request intent as PENDING, retry only through a shared gate, and materialize either a versioned result or terminal UNKNOWN.
local_validation_needed: Verify whether an unavailable result can later become available.
Measure safe retry cadence only in an approved non-production harness.

problem: Correlation retrieval receives throttling or Retry-After-style guidance.
observed_pattern: High-vote forum experience reports rate limits around Prod Correlation. Another code post demonstrates response-guided waiting, but its direct-call implementation is non-adoptable.
preconditions: One scheduler owns the operation budget.
Workers share a durable rate-limit state.
failure_cases: 429 or retry guidance is absent, malformed, or exceeds a task deadline.
Independent workers retry simultaneously.
security_risk: Do not embed endpoints, headers, identities, or unmanaged retry loops in callers.
recommended_pattern: Classify throttling separately, honor bounded server guidance, suspend the shared queue, and expose a retryable audit state.
local_validation_needed: Establish approved per-operation budget and maximum wait.
Verify whether throttling scope is account, operation, or global.

problem: Repeated correlation reads duplicate cost and create inconsistent result records.
observed_pattern: A community implementation uses an existence check and upsert-style durable storage. Its database and access code are excluded; only cache-keyed de-duplication is relevant.
preconditions: A result key includes immutable simulation/profile version and correlation kind.
Result freshness is explicit.
failure_cases: A stale result is reused after relevant profile or pool state changes.
Concurrent readers race to materialize the same record.
security_risk: The original code contains direct authentication and storage details that are prohibited from publication and adoption.
recommended_pattern: Use idempotency keys, atomic insert-or-return, observed-at time, source version, and a stale/refresh-required state.
local_validation_needed: Define invalidation triggers for each correlation kind.
Test duplicate requests and partial-write recovery.

problem: Self-to-PP-to-Prod layered screening is tempting as a low-cost funnel.
observed_pattern: One author explicitly calls the apparent Self < PP < Prod ordering an unsupported observation and suggests PP prefiltering. It is a hypothesis, not a platform rule.
preconditions: No admission decision depends on the heuristic.
The funnel labels all cutoffs as locally calibrated candidates.
failure_cases: Ordering reverses or PP and Prod disagree.
Pool membership, profile, or timing changes invalidate comparisons.
security_risk: Treating a community observation as an automatic rejection rule would create unsupported exclusion.
recommended_pattern: Use Self and PP only as optional prioritization signals; request Prod only through the authorized gate and retain all disagreement samples.
local_validation_needed: Build paired observations segmented by Region, Delay, Universe, alpha type, and date.
Estimate false-negative and false-positive rates before enabling any prioritization.

problem: A PP route displays a Prod Correlation-looking error.
observed_pattern: A high-vote Consultant post reports a PP submission failure whose displayed message was interpreted as Prod related; a reply proposes fallback-to-regular handling. This is evidence of diagnostic ambiguity, not authoritative error semantics.
preconditions: Original platform page is retained for human review.
No automated classifier treats the displayed label as root cause.
failure_cases: Displayed error and underlying comparison pool differ.
Fallback behavior changes over time.
security_risk: Automatically retrying or reclassifying a submission based on ambiguous text can bypass intended admission behavior.
recommended_pattern: Capture opaque error class, candidate context, and raw-local evidence; route to human diagnosis or an approved authoritative mapping.
local_validation_needed: Obtain current official error taxonomy.
Collect consented, non-production examples to validate PP/regular fallback interpretation.

problem: A Multi parent can complete while individual children differ in status.
observed_pattern: Forum queue implementations and an AI validation post both describe child-level outcomes, cancellation/exception handling, and masked batch errors.
preconditions: Parent and child records have separate stable identifiers in the local domain model.
No platform call is made without an approved adapter.
failure_cases: Parent terminal state arrives before child detail.
Child result is missing, cancelled, invalid, or duplicated.
security_risk: Forum implementations contain direct execution paths; those paths are non-adoptable.
recommended_pattern: Use a parent/child state machine with nonterminal polling, per-child terminal records, idempotent materialization, and timeout-to-UNKNOWN.
local_validation_needed: Confirm official lifecycle semantics.
Test parent-complete/child-pending and duplicate-poll cases locally.

problem: External systems show useful scheduler design but include unsafe execution behavior.
observed_pattern: A public repository separates bounded work queues, completion tracking, and durable result collection; its platform/session/notification sections are out of scope. The reusable insight is slot release after terminal work, not its external calls.
preconditions: The scheduler is behind the project API Gate.
Concurrency is locally configured under resource ceilings.
failure_cases: Worker failure leaks a slot.
Notification or persistence failure changes task truth.
security_risk: Repository contains real-platform and secret-adjacent integrations; do not import, vendor, or run it.
recommended_pattern: Separate scheduler state from execution adapters; release slots only after a durable terminal transition, and make notification best-effort only.
local_validation_needed: Fault-inject worker crash and persistence outage.
Validate CPU/RAM-constrained concurrency on the target environment.

problem: Research pipeline needs resume, error classification, and result recall.
observed_pattern: A public generator records progress, distinguishes terminal success/failure/timeout, and persists resumable state, while its direct execution and performance payload handling are prohibited.
preconditions: Only sanitized candidate metadata is stored in review artifacts.
Execution authority remains external to the pattern.
failure_cases: A resume file claims success without durable evidence.
Timeout is treated as a failed candidate rather than UNKNOWN.
security_risk: Repository includes direct authentication and real execution patterns; no code or endpoint may be reused.
recommended_pattern: Persist task attempts, state transitions, error class, next-eligible-at, and result reference separately; allow resume only from auditable durable state.
local_validation_needed: Test crash recovery between result receipt and commit.
Define retention and redaction rules for operational records.

problem: Correlation reduction advice can overfit or obscure quality losses.
observed_pattern: A recent practice post reports a scoped transformation experiment and comments note divergent outcomes. A low-vote generic advice post has reliability concerns. Neither establishes a reusable optimization recipe.
preconditions: No formulas, metrics, or submitted results are exported.
Each experiment is reversible and individually recorded.
failure_cases: Correlation reduction coincides with degraded quality or unavailable operators.
Multiple changes obscure causality.
security_risk: Publishing expressions or automating optimization can expose private research and bypass review.
recommended_pattern: Use one-change experiments, holdout comparison, scope tags, and a human review checkpoint before any future authorized action.
local_validation_needed: Define internal non-sensitive quality and correlation comparison protocol.
Check reproducibility across profiles before any generalization.

problem: Direct correlation retrieval code is publicly available but conflicts with governance.
observed_pattern: Two forum code posts expose direct session-based retrieval and result storage concepts. They demonstrate why an explicit non-adoption boundary is necessary.
preconditions: Human authorization, API Gate, scheduler, adapter, audit, and budget controls exist before any future real integration.
failure_cases: Credentials or endpoint details enter a public asset.
A caller bypasses the scheduler or retries independently.
security_risk: Critical: source patterns can expose credentials and enable ungoverned platform access.
recommended_pattern: Do not adopt code; preserve only neutral state-machine requirements and use safe local mocks for testing.
local_validation_needed: Run a sensitive-information scan before every review publication.
Review authorization boundaries before any connector work.

problem: A local worker crash or restart can make platform-side simulation state unknown.
observed_pattern: A forum author reports a local process interrupt while remote simulation work continued to occupy slots. The accompanying cancellation code is explicitly non-adoptable.
preconditions: The caller has durable parent/child records before dispatch.
Recovery can use an independently authorized read path.
failure_cases: Restart assumes a slot was released based only on a client exit.
Cancellation changes remote state without a human-approved authority.
security_risk: The source includes destructive direct-platform cancellation; it must not be copied or invoked.
recommended_pattern: Transition unfinished jobs to UNKNOWN on process loss, block slot reuse for their reservation, then reconcile and materialize a terminal state through the shared adapter.
local_validation_needed: Obtain official interruption and cancellation semantics.
Fault-inject worker termination and verify no duplicate dispatch in local mocks.

problem: AI-generated cross-dataset templates can overfit, exceed resource budgets, or create correlated candidates.
observed_pattern: A community leader reports semantic template expansion across fields/datasets, followed by correlation and operator-budget problems that required human adjustment.
preconditions: Candidate field and operator records exist in an active local registry.
A human authorizes any later real validation.
failure_cases: AI invents unavailable operators or mismatched field types.
Cross-dataset substitution degrades performance or raises correlation.
security_risk: Source discusses automated cross-dataset execution; no direct call, formula, or submission path may be adopted.
recommended_pattern: Use AI for semantic hypotheses only; validate type, scope, operator count, and novelty before a candidate enters a research plan.
local_validation_needed: Measure semantic-substitution hit rate using local mock evaluation.
Define a template schema and import path separate from the platform registry.

failure_cases: Theme window has ended or rules were edited.
A candidate uses TOP3000 assumptions, unsupported neutralization, unsupported strategy family, or fields outside current access.
Screenshot-visible excerpt is mistaken for complete comments.
local_validation_needed: Open the original page in logged-in Chrome and capture full comments into the local-only raw archive.
Verify current theme eligibility, allowed strategies and auxiliary-field wording.
observed_pattern: The screenshot-visible PPA post states a USA/D1 Power Pool July 2026 theme centered on neutralization, TOP1000, Delay 1, USA, and supported neutralization/strategy families. Only visible page evidence is retained; comments need manual capture.
preconditions: Current theme page must be manually rechecked before use.
Candidate generation must use a current registry snapshot and hard admission.
problem: PPA July 2026 research can drift outside the actual theme scope.
recommended_pattern: Create a scoped PPA research lane with explicit USA/D1/TOP1000/theme-rule validation and treat neutralization choice as an experiment dimension, not a fixed rule.
security_risk: Do not publish full post/comment bodies, user account data, formula examples, Alpha IDs or results.

failure_cases: Optimizing a single leaderboard alpha reduces pool diversity.
Removing a tag is assumed to remove the alpha from the self-correlation pool.
Formula complexity or field count grows beyond PP intent.
local_validation_needed: Build local pool-diversity reports from user-approved submitted-pool metadata only.
Validate any numeric threshold against current official wording.
observed_pattern: Official Power Pool guidance favors simpler, smaller, higher-quality alphas, low turnover, liquid universes, investability-aware review, and diversity across datasets, ideas, operators, universes and turnover.
preconditions: Use current Power Pool document and registry snapshot.
Pool membership and self-correlation history must be treated as persistent state.
problem: Power Pool candidates can satisfy single-alpha checks while weakening pool quality.
recommended_pattern: Score PP research plans on simplicity, turnover, investability, diversity and pool-correlation risk before expensive checks.
security_risk: Do not publish actual submitted alphas, pool membership, or private performance.

failure_cases: A generic transform lowers one correlation metric but harms Sharpe, turnover, sub-universe or pool quality.
PP and Prod diagnostic messages are treated as interchangeable root causes.
local_validation_needed: Create paired local evidence matrices before any threshold becomes policy.
Keep PP-first screening as hypothesis only until sampled.
observed_pattern: High-vote forum material recommends differentiation across region, delay, universe, settings, datasets and transformations; later reduction-practice posts show mixed outcomes and quality tradeoffs.
preconditions: Each correlation intervention must be scoped by profile and recorded as one reversible change.
Correlation observations must include freshness and comparison pool.
problem: Low-correlation advice is often overgeneralized into brittle transformation recipes.
recommended_pattern: Use a low-cost funnel of idea-family diversification, registry-scoped templates, authorized correlation observations, and one-change-at-a-time experiment logging.
security_risk: Do not publish formulas, metrics, submitted pools, or production correlation tables.

failure_cases: Chasing forum-style high payout stories at the expense of robust pyramids.
Ignoring CAP refresh lag or slot/tie-breaker competition.
local_validation_needed: Human review of current Genius dashboard wording.
Decide which dashboard fields may be manually entered into local private state.
observed_pattern: Official Genius documentation says level progress is tracked through signal count, formulated pyramids, and Combined Alpha Performance, with slot limits and tie-breaker metrics. Forum reward anecdotes are not policy.
preconditions: Use current quarter official thresholds and dashboard values.
Do not infer eligibility from old forum screenshots.
problem: Genius/Master/GM promotion anecdotes can mislead research priorities.
recommended_pattern: Make research-pack planning track pyramid coverage, signal count, CAP-quality proxies, operator/field diversity, and quarterly timing as review features, not hard admission rules.
security_risk: Do not publish personal dashboard, payments, referrals, account level or submitted pool.

failure_cases: Copying direct request code or credentials handling.
Letting AI-generated scripts bypass hard admission or budget controls.
local_validation_needed: Build a private local inventory of script patterns without source code.
Require human review before converting any pattern into business code.
observed_pattern: Local curated sources and public code examples show queues, retry/cache, result upsert, expression validation and template generation. Direct auth, endpoints, cookies, account IDs and real execution paths are excluded.
preconditions: Only generic state machines and data models may be adopted.
Real WQ remains behind API Gate, admission, scheduler, adapter and audit.
problem: Forum Python scripts mix useful architecture with unsafe direct platform behavior.
recommended_pattern: Classify scripts into offline analysis, template generation, queue/cache/retry, validation, result materialization and non-adoptable direct execution.
security_risk: High: original forum/code sources may contain execution logic; public assets retain no executable bypass code.

failure_cases: Using stale field availability or unavailable operators.
Applying long lookbacks to high-frequency event data without checking staleness.
Ignoring coverage and long/short count in liquid universes.
local_validation_needed: Create registry-backed field pools per region/delay/universe.
Measure coverage and operator availability before candidate creation.
observed_pattern: Official dataset guides suggest matching data type and economics to operator families: score/delta/group transforms for model and analyst data, decay for high-frequency sentiment, vector/time-series transforms for option-style data, and risk neutralization for exposure control.
preconditions: A current platform registry must provide field type, scope and operator compatibility.
Generated templates remain draft until validated.
problem: Dataset/operator exploration becomes too broad for a small server and limited simulation budget.
recommended_pattern: Use field-first template lanes with per-dataset operator pools, window pools, group variants, and failure repairs; queue only a small reviewed set for offline expansion.
security_risk: Do not publish private field access lists, real candidate expressions, simulation results or PnL.

problem: Community MCP/Agent systems mix useful workflow ideas with unsafe autonomous execution.
observed_pattern: Forum prototypes split tool transport, analysis/agent logic and local memory or routing. Their direct platform access is excluded; only component boundaries and auditable handoffs are reusable.
preconditions: MCP/RAG tools are read-only advisory inputs.
Hard admission, scheduler, adapter and audit remain separate deterministic modules.
failure_cases: Agent attempts to submit, alter budget or bypass a gate.
Source text assumes stored credentials or unattended direct platform calls.
security_risk: High: source posts contain or describe direct automation and credential-dependent setup. No source code or platform access flow may be adopted.
recommended_pattern: Use a one-way research plan interface: retrieve evidence -> propose candidate -> validate locally -> await human-authorized gated execution. Persist provenance and decision state at every handoff.
local_validation_needed: Test that an agent cannot invoke execution adapters directly.
Audit that all candidate transitions have a registry snapshot and human authorization boundary.

problem: A FastExpr idea is converted to Python without evidence that semantics survive the conversion.
observed_pattern: Forum contributors report differences in execution model, available history, missing values and state. They use comparison-based testing, but their implementation details and thresholds vary.

applicability.Alpha_type: Python candidate derived from a FastExpr idea

preconditions: A registry confirms field type, history and operator support.
An offline harness defines expected output contract and comparison evidence.
failure_cases: Naive translation changes missing-value, window or state behavior.
A Python implementation performs differently across profiles.
security_risk: Source code and concrete formulas are excluded. Do not transfer execution snippets or source-specific thresholds into a public or production path.
recommended_pattern: Create a semantic-parity review record before scheduling: intended operator behavior, history window, state requirements, output type, test scenario and unresolved differences.
local_validation_needed: Define authorized parity metrics and acceptable divergence by operator family.
Confirm current official Python operator guidance before accepting an implementation.

problem: Batch retrieval and reuse scripts can leak credentials or repeat expensive work.
observed_pattern: A forum script combines caching, incremental collection, pruning and concurrent batches while also embedding direct authentication. The data-flow pattern is useful only after removal of all platform-specific access logic.
preconditions: No credentials, headers, endpoints or account identifiers enter the collector or cache.
Results are source-versioned and written idempotently.
failure_cases: Stale cache reused after a profile or source change.
Concurrent workers duplicate work or persist a partial record.
security_risk: High: the original source contains prohibited direct authentication and account access material.
recommended_pattern: Keep only generic cache key, freshness, bounded queue, retry classification and atomic materialization concepts. Route all approved read operations through the shared gate and audit.
local_validation_needed: Test restart recovery and concurrent de-duplication.
Specify invalidation triggers and cache retention for each local artifact class.

problem: A short-lived Power Pool theme is mistaken for an enduring eligibility rule.
observed_pattern: Community threads describe a July 2026 campaign and debate theme versus regular submission paths. Comment claims conflict and are not an official contract.
preconditions: A current official campaign source is manually captured.
Effective and expiry dates are explicit.
failure_cases: Forum wording or a community threshold becomes a permanent policy.
Theme configuration outlives its campaign or is applied to another profile.
security_risk: Do not publish or use participant-specific results, identifiers, formulas, pool membership or submission advice from comment threads.
recommended_pattern: Maintain a private, human-approved campaign registry with source URL, scope, effective range and UNKNOWN fields. Use it only to prioritize research ideas, never to authorize submission.
local_validation_needed: Confirm every campaign field against current official wording.
Verify expiry handling blocks stale campaign configuration.

problem: Promotion, Genius and VF stories are converted into user-scoring or submission targets.
observed_pattern: Forum authors attribute improvement to diversity, disciplined review and learning, while peer comments provide unverified advice. These are useful research-retrospective prompts, not policy or outcome evidence.
preconditions: Official dashboard definitions are separately verified.
Any personal dashboard observation stays private and manually entered.
failure_cases: Anecdotal thresholds are treated as current rules.
Private account data or performance results enter Git or review assets.
security_risk: High privacy risk around account progress, results and identities; public assets retain no user-level data.
recommended_pattern: Use only generic retrospective tags such as diversity hypothesis, research breadth and multi-metric review. Keep progression logic and account outcomes out of automated admission.
local_validation_needed: Capture current official Genius/VF definitions before any policy discussion.
Review whether a private dashboard import is authorized and auditable.

problem: Optimization loops make multiple changes at once and cannot explain why an outcome changed.
observed_pattern: A workflow post advocates one controlled change, small variant groups and retained observations. Its success claims and platform-specific thresholds are unverified.
preconditions: Each experiment stores immutable source/profile snapshots.
The run budget is approved before scheduling.
failure_cases: Multiple simultaneous mutations obscure causal attribution.
Research notes become detached from source and result provenance.
security_risk: Do not publish platform check values, source formulas, candidate IDs or private results.
recommended_pattern: Record hypothesis, one mutation, registry snapshot, bounded variant set, observation reference and next decision. Keep admission and real execution outside the loop.
local_validation_needed: Set a local experiment budget and audit schema.
Test recovery when a variant or result artifact is missing.

problem: A crowded data family continues to produce high correlation after operator tuning.
observed_pattern: One scoped CHN Python retrospective reports that multiple operator and parameter variants remained crowded until the researcher changed the data-family hypothesis. This is a single practitioner observation, not a generic correlation rule.
preconditions: Current registry metadata is available.
A human-approved economic hypothesis exists for each field family.
failure_cases: A new data family has little signal quality.
An apparently unused field is still economically redundant or becomes crowded later.
security_risk: The source contains local simulation and correlation details; do not copy its code, thresholds, field names or results.
recommended_pattern: Treat a data-family change as one controlled research mutation and record quality, correlation state and provenance separately.
local_validation_needed: Measure local family-diversity and quality tradeoffs by profile.
Define evidence needed before abandoning a family under a local budget.

problem: A local Power Pool correlation precheck can become stale or misclassify pool membership.
observed_pattern: Forum code uses a platform classification-like signal instead of a mutable tag as a local pool-membership cue. It is evidence that membership and freshness need explicit provenance, not that a local replica is authoritative.
preconditions: An authorized read-only observation source exists.
Pool identity and observation time are persisted.
failure_cases: Tag, classification and authoritative pool state diverge.
A local calculation is interpreted as a submission check.
security_risk: Source implementations can expose private pool membership, result data or direct access patterns; they are non-adoptable.
recommended_pattern: Store local prechecks as advisory, version them by pool identity and observed-at time, and retain UNKNOWN whenever authoritative membership is unavailable.
local_validation_needed: Compare a consented local precheck with authorized observation records.
Define pool-state invalidation triggers without copying request code.

problem: A large batch contains many high-scoring but redundant candidate variants.
observed_pattern: A forum workflow clusters pairwise PnL correlation into connected families, then compares representatives inside each family. The method is useful for review prioritization only; no threshold or score is adopted.
preconditions: Authorized, comparable local observation series exist.
Candidate provenance is retained for every family member.
failure_cases: Unequal windows or missing observations create false families.
Family representatives are mistaken for a platform correlation result.
security_risk: Do not publish PnL arrays, expressions, result identifiers or batch internals.
recommended_pattern: Build an offline correlation graph, retain all candidates, label family membership and route only a human-reviewed representative set to later research gates.
local_validation_needed: Choose a local clustering method and sensitivity analysis.
Test selection diversity against a held-out research batch.

problem: Static field and operator assumptions create unsupported research candidates.
observed_pattern: Two forum scripts report that visible fields, operators and allowed scopes can depend on account context. Their credential and direct-call code is prohibited, but the metadata-freshness issue is relevant.
preconditions: An approved registry snapshot source is configured.
The snapshot includes scope and freshness metadata.
failure_cases: A stale snapshot authorizes an unavailable field or operator.
A community scraper is used instead of the approved API Gate.
security_risk: The sources contain credential configuration and direct account access patterns; never copy, run or publish them.
recommended_pattern: Resolve every candidate against a versioned, authorized capability snapshot before admission and fail closed when scope or freshness is unknown.
local_validation_needed: Define snapshot expiry and invalidation conditions.
Test mismatch handling with synthetic registry changes.

problem: Research loops confuse platform backpressure with a bad hypothesis.
observed_pattern: A forum loop classifies research observations separately from pending, queueing and timeout conditions. Its visual labels and metrics are not adopted, but explicit failure taxonomy is reusable.
preconditions: A durable experiment record exists.
Result states have auditable timestamps.
failure_cases: An infrastructure delay is recorded as a candidate rejection.
A near-gate metric becomes an autonomous resubmission loop.
security_risk: Do not turn forum thresholds, prompts or platform calls into autonomous execution.
recommended_pattern: Record candidate, gate and infrastructure states independently; reconcile ambiguous platform observations only through the authorized adapter.
local_validation_needed: Map local error classes to durable state transitions.
Verify that retry ownership remains with the shared scheduler.

problem: FastExpr-to-Python conversion loses type, history or state semantics.
observed_pattern: A forum conversion guide distinguishes cross-sectional vector work from time-series matrix work and proposes bounded rolling state. Its implementation and direct execution flow are non-adoptable.
preconditions: Source semantics are documented.
A private parity harness can compare input shape, missing values, history and output contract.
failure_cases: Rolling state misaligns with universe changes.
Performance optimization changes the intended calculation.
security_risk: The source includes executable conversion and simulation material; public assets retain no code, formulas or direct platform calls.
recommended_pattern: Require a semantic contract and bounded state model before conversion; accept only parity-evidenced proposals into the normal admission path.
local_validation_needed: Test state reset, universe changes and missing-value behavior offline.
Set resource ceilings for private parity tests.

problem: Expression-like and source-file-like research inputs bypass different safety checks.
observed_pattern: A forum dual-mode tool routes two input forms through one downstream implementation. Its direct REST and polling behavior is non-adoptable, but converging inputs at one internal contract reduces divergent safety paths.
preconditions: Both inputs can be statically inspected.
Candidate provenance is available without storing private source code publicly.
failure_cases: One path omits admission or audit fields.
A source file embeds hidden execution behavior.
security_risk: Original code contains direct platform requests, polling and execution details; do not adopt it.
recommended_pattern: Normalize every input into one immutable CandidatePlan, then require the same admission, scheduler, adapter and audit chain.
local_validation_needed: Compare intake validation coverage across input forms.
Define private-code retention and redaction rules.

problem: Promotion retrospectives tempt automation of PPA tag changes or portfolio score optimization.
observed_pattern: A personal progression post reports tag edits alongside later displayed outcomes, but offers no official causal contract. It is a manual-review risk signal, not a mechanism or workflow.
preconditions: Current official tag semantics are available.
A human approves any account-affecting action.
failure_cases: A stale anecdote is interpreted as an eligibility or reward rule.
An automated system mutates tags to optimize a displayed metric.
security_risk: Tag changes can affect account-scoped platform state; this material cannot authorize a write path.
recommended_pattern: Keep tag-related evidence as read-only research metadata and require human review plus official evidence before any design decision.
local_validation_needed: Obtain current official documentation and audit semantics.
Confirm whether any tag action can affect eligibility, correlation pools or presentation.

problem: A large research batch reaches expensive correlation stages with redundant candidate variants.
observed_pattern: Two community code posts use pairwise local return or PnL comparisons to screen a batch before later correlation work. The reusable pattern is offline diversity triage after an authorized pullback, not a replica of platform correlation or a rejection rule.
preconditions: Comparable authorized local observations exist.
Every series has profile, window and observed-at provenance.
The batch remains a human-reviewed research artifact.
failure_cases: Different windows or missing values create false similarity.
A local score is mistaken for Self, Power Pool or Prod correlation.
A stale cache hides a relevant profile change.
security_risk: High: source implementations include account-scoped data retrieval and direct platform access patterns that are excluded.
recommended_pattern: Build a local correlation graph for advisory family labels, preserve all candidates and route only human-reviewed representatives to later authorized gates.
local_validation_needed: Compare family sensitivity across windows and missing-value handling.
Define cache invalidation by profile and observation freshness.
Verify that no local threshold can reject or submit a candidate.

problem: A turnkey SuperAlpha script combines generation, backtest, correlation screening and submission-oriented workflow in one authority domain.
observed_pattern: A detailed community automation post presents continuous generation and platform-facing actions alongside credential and result handling. Its architecture demonstrates why advisory research, admission, scheduling and execution must remain separated.
preconditions: None for adoption; the source is retained only as a risk example.
failure_cases: A model or script gains credentials and can execute without a human approval.
Threshold anecdotes become automatic submission policy.
A long-running process loses audit or budget ownership.
security_risk: Critical: the source contains prohibited credential, direct-request and autonomous execution material.
recommended_pattern: Do not adopt. Keep research generation offline and advisory; enforce the existing CandidatePlan, hard-admission, shared-scheduler, API-Gate and audit chain for any future authorized work.
local_validation_needed: Review only the negative architecture lesson in a threat model.
Test that no research helper can receive an execution capability.

problem: Field-similarity exploration can confuse data-family novelty with Alpha-correlation evidence.
observed_pattern: A Brain Labs post caches scoped field observations and compares candidate fields to find related or alternative families. It is a hypothesis-generation aid with coverage, timing and type limitations.
preconditions: An approved observation source is available.
Cache keys include scope, field identity, source version and observed-at time.
Field type and coverage metadata are retained.
failure_cases: Partial enumeration or stale observations create misleading similarity.
Field similarity is treated as a quality, novelty or submission result.
A direct client implementation bypasses the API Gate.
security_risk: Source code accesses platform data directly; only the generic cache and uncertainty pattern is reusable.
recommended_pattern: Represent field similarity as an advisory proposal signal with coverage and freshness labels, then validate each proposed family through the registry and normal research flow.
local_validation_needed: Measure cache hit, coverage and stale-result behavior on synthetic data.
Confirm whether an approved local source can support this analysis without real platform calls.

problem: Expression-like research input hides which fields and operators need validation.
observed_pattern: A forum parser extracts data-field and operator dependencies before later processing. This supports static inventory as a preflight artifact, while parser completeness and expression semantics remain separate questions.
preconditions: A parser is run locally without execution.
Extracted dependencies are resolved against an approved registry snapshot.
Raw expression retention follows private-data policy.
failure_cases: Aliases or unsupported syntax yield incomplete dependencies.
Static parsing is mistaken for type, scope or semantic validation.
A public asset stores a private expression.
security_risk: Do not publish input expressions, field identifiers or parser logs from private candidates.
recommended_pattern: Attach a private dependency manifest to CandidatePlan and fail closed on unknown or ambiguous dependencies before human review or admission.
local_validation_needed: Create parser corpus tests with benign synthetic inputs.
Version dependency manifests with the registry snapshot used for resolution.

problem: Forum-template discovery workflows can cross from research assistance into unsafe platform execution.
observed_pattern: MCP-assisted posts describe discovery, feasibility review, optimization narratives and test loops. Their credential and direct-execution paths are non-adoptable, but their staged review shape is useful after inserting a hard safety boundary.
preconditions: Forum text is treated as untrusted material.
The assistant receives only sanitized hypotheses and approved metadata.
Any actual test remains separately human-authorized.
failure_cases: An assistant follows source instructions to authenticate or execute.
Repeated variants blur provenance and budget.
A template becomes an executable Alpha without registry checks.
security_risk: High: cited workflows include direct authentication, execution and private-input handling examples.
recommended_pattern: Use source discovery -> sanitize -> role-based template candidate -> registry/static review -> CandidatePlan -> human approval. Stop before any real adapter or submission action.
local_validation_needed: Threat-model every assistant tool capability.
Verify that CandidatePlan creation cannot enqueue work by itself.
Test provenance retention across template revisions.

problem: AI-generated Power Pool descriptions can disclose private candidate content or be mistaken for submission authority.
observed_pattern: Two community posts use language models to draft descriptions from expressions, settings and field or operator context. Their useful lesson is structured documentation support, not external sharing of private Alpha material or automated submission.
preconditions: Inputs are redacted CandidatePlan metadata only.
A human reviews every generated description.
The model receives no credential or execution capability.
failure_cases: A full expression, field identity or account context is sent to an unapproved model.
Generated prose claims unsupported economics or policy compliance.
Description drafting triggers submission or tag mutation.
security_risk: High privacy and governance risk when an external model receives candidate or account-specific content.
recommended_pattern: Generate optional draft explanations from role placeholders, approved registry labels and a non-sensitive hypothesis. Store provenance and require a human edit before any display.
local_validation_needed: Define a content-redaction contract for AI prompts.
Audit model output for unsupported claims and sensitive echoes.
Verify that description generation has no write side effect.

problem: Osmosis point-allocation scripts introduce an account-scoped write path under a heuristic objective.
observed_pattern: A community script proposes a Fitness-weighted allocation and tells the user to enable the final write only after review. This is evidence of a write-risk surface, not of official Osmosis rewards or allocation mechanics.
preconditions: None for adoption; current official rules and explicit human authorization would be required first.
failure_cases: A heuristic is mistaken for a reward-optimal official policy.
An account write is enabled without an approval, scope, budget and audit record.
Stale competition timing or scope changes invalidate the action.
security_risk: Critical account-write risk; source code and write mechanics are excluded from public assets.
recommended_pattern: NON_ADOPTABLE. Keep Osmosis material as read-only research context until current official rules and a separately approved, audited workflow exist.
local_validation_needed: Obtain current official allocation, timing, lock and reward evidence.
Document whether any future write action can be made reversible and auditable.

problem: Combined Power Pool performance retrospectives are converted into tag, region or quality optimization rules.
observed_pattern: One author attributes a later combined-performance trend to a mixture of quality filters, diversity and tag handling, while acknowledging unknown future data and personal judgement. It is an anecdote suitable only for hypothesis tagging.
preconditions: Current official Power Pool semantics are separately verified.
No personal outcome data is published or used as a rule.
failure_cases: Correlation, quality or tag anecdotes become account-scoring policy.
Historical observations are assumed to hold after unseen data changes.
A helper writes tags or changes a portfolio based on a narrative.
security_risk: Account performance and tag interpretation are sensitive; neither outcomes nor account actions belong in public assets.
recommended_pattern: Store only generic research tags such as diversity hypothesis and portfolio-context uncertainty. Keep all account metrics and tag actions manual and outside automation.
local_validation_needed: Capture current official pool and tag semantics.
Test diversity hypotheses in a private approved research protocol without account mutation.

problem: Field and operator count stories are treated as a Grandmaster promotion recipe.
observed_pattern: Two global community discussions frame field and operator balance as an Alpha-construction question. They do not supply an official promotion rule or a portable optimum.
preconditions: A candidate has an explicit economic hypothesis.
Every dependency can be resolved against the current registry.
failure_cases: A target count replaces economic reasoning.
More operators or fields obscure semantic intent and validation coverage.
An anecdote becomes a GM eligibility or value-factor target.
security_risk: Do not couple personal promotion information or private results to complexity metrics.
recommended_pattern: Treat dependency count as a descriptive diversity and review-complexity feature. Combine it with static validation and hypothesis review; never use it as a promotion or admission gate.
local_validation_needed: Measure parser coverage and review burden by dependency count.
Assess diversity and semantic clarity without using account outcomes.

problem: A forum earnings template is copied across scopes without data-type, coverage or hypothesis review.
observed_pattern: An earnings-template post describes a source-specific vector-oriented data family and staged experimentation. Its reported attempts and outcome are private practitioner evidence, not a transferable template result.
preconditions: An approved registry confirms the field type and scope.
The economic event hypothesis is reviewed before operator selection.
A role-only template candidate is kept separate from a real expression.
failure_cases: A vector field is used with an incompatible operator.
Source-specific turnover or coverage observations become universal rules.
A real formula or field identifier is published in a template artifact.
security_risk: Forum templates can reveal private fields, formulas and results; public artifacts retain only generic role metadata.
recommended_pattern: Use a role-based earnings-event template family with explicit type and scope checks, then validate each private instantiation through the normal research process.
local_validation_needed: Confirm type-compatible operator families from the registry.
Run offline coverage and missingness checks before any research plan.
Keep every source-specific field and result local-only.

problem: Batch field discovery hits throttling or produces an unsafe local inventory.
observed_pattern: A community batch-field utility reports retry handling for throttling and writes a selected field list for later research. The retained pattern is a bounded, cached metadata collector with explicit throttle state; its access implementation is prohibited.
preconditions: An approved read-only metadata source exists.
A shared collector owns retry and cache state.
Selected field lists retain snapshot version and scope.
failure_cases: Multiple workers retry independently after throttling.
A list from one profile or date is reused under another.
A copied access script bypasses the API Gate.
security_risk: The source contains direct platform-access code; no request details or field identifiers are retained.
recommended_pattern: Use a shared bounded queue with throttle classification, freshness metadata and idempotent snapshot writes. Send only approved snapshot facts to research planning.
local_validation_needed: Test 429 and retry state transitions with a mock source.
Define cache expiry and scope mismatch behavior.
Verify that a failed refresh leaves the prior snapshot explicitly stale rather than current.

problem: Repeated Prod-correlation reads waste budget and present stale values as current.
observed_pattern: A browser-side community plugin records a last displayed ProdCorr result to reduce repeated lookup. It supports an observation-cache UX pattern only; a displayed cached value is not authoritative or fresh by default.
preconditions: An approved observation is materialized with kind, profile version and observed-at time.
Cache display labels stale or unavailable states.
failure_cases: A cached number is used after a relevant profile or pool change.
A UI label hides the correlation kind or source timestamp.
A plugin bypasses central rate limits.
security_risk: Do not copy browser-session or direct-access behavior from the source.
recommended_pattern: Persist immutable correlation observations behind the shared scheduler, de-duplicate by request identity and show cache freshness explicitly. Revalidate only through an approved read path.
local_validation_needed: Define invalidation events for each correlation kind.
Test stale-display and missing-observation handling.
Confirm cache reads cannot trigger unbounded refreshes.

problem: A single correlation metric is treated as evidence of pool diversity.
observed_pattern: A PPAC discussion reports a low SelfCor label alongside a high pool-correlation observation and argues that individual quality can coexist with a redundant collective pool. Its metric definitions and values are not authoritative, but it is a counterexample to any one-metric diversity rule.
preconditions: Each correlation kind is stored as a separate observation with scope and timestamp.
Metric names are confirmed against current official definitions.
failure_cases: Forum terminology is mistaken for official interface semantics.
A low Self result is assumed to imply low pool or Prod correlation.
A pool observation from a contest is generalized to regular submission.
security_risk: Do not publish or act on account-level correlation values or contest results.
recommended_pattern: Keep Self, Power Pool and Prod observations separate; treat their relationship as a local research question with paired authorized samples and no hard ordering assumption.
local_validation_needed: Build a paired-observation matrix by identical profile and observation date.
Validate official metric definitions before interpreting any gap.
Measure reversals and missingness rather than adopting a threshold.

problem: A forum-reported monthly PPA count or rejection edge case is converted into automatic quota routing.
observed_pattern: A community tool counts account-scoped PPA activity by region and claims a submission-capacity failure mode. The report is useful as a manual alert but does not provide an authoritative capacity, reset or error contract.
preconditions: Current official quota and reset semantics are captured.
A human approves any account-scoped capacity interpretation.
failure_cases: Forum capacity language becomes scheduler configuration.
A transient error is classified as exhausted capacity.
Private submitted-pool data is collected or published.
security_risk: High privacy risk around account submission history and a high governance risk around automatic submission routing.
recommended_pattern: Treat capacity reports as UNKNOWN manual-review alerts. Do not query user submission history or alter queue priority without official evidence and explicit authorization.
local_validation_needed: Obtain current official capacity and time-boundary wording.
Develop a synthetic quota-state test without real account data.
Define a fail-closed response for ambiguous rejection states.

problem: Contest payment anecdotes are used to optimize Alpha selection or correlation behavior.
observed_pattern: A PPAC author compares personal observations and proposes that correlation can influence a contest base payment. The post explicitly remains exploratory and does not establish a reward formula or a current campaign contract.
preconditions: Current official contest terms are available.
Private account outcomes remain outside public assets and automated logic.
failure_cases: Reported rewards become an AI objective or scheduler score.
Contest conditions are generalized to regular submissions.
Correlation metrics are inferred from a payment outcome.
security_risk: Account-specific rewards and competition outcomes are sensitive and must not enter Git or runtime scoring.
recommended_pattern: Store reward narratives only as a manual research question. Use official terms and approved private data before any human decision; never optimize automation toward anecdotal payment outcomes.
local_validation_needed: Capture the current official PPAC reward and eligibility contract.
Separate campaign observations from regular-submission observations.
Audit any private analysis for prohibited account data leakage.

problem: A region-specific neutralization and data-family success story becomes a universal mining recipe.
observed_pattern: A practitioner describes an Asia-Pacific slow-setting workflow and a data-family observation after prior crowding concerns. It is a scoped research lead, not evidence that one neutralization, region or dataset has a portable advantage.
preconditions: Current registry availability and setting compatibility are verified.
A distinct economic hypothesis exists for the chosen data family.
One mutation is tested at a time.
failure_cases: A regional anecdote drives mass template generation.
Neutralization changes hide an unrelated quality regression.
A data family is treated as novel without correlation or coverage evidence.
security_risk: Do not publish source field names, formulas, account counts or performance claims.
recommended_pattern: Use neutralization and data-family choice as explicitly scoped experiment dimensions. Record profile, family role, quality state and correlation observations separately.
local_validation_needed: Validate settings against the approved registry snapshot.
Run private controlled comparisons across a small approved profile set.
Measure quality and diversity tradeoffs without adopting source thresholds.

problem: Field-selection dashboards use stale inventories or allow invalid setting combinations.
observed_pattern: A forum dashboard workflow visualizes field counts and ties query variables to Region, Delay, Universe and category constraints. Its database and access setup are non-adoptable, but profile compatibility and snapshot freshness are reusable design concerns.
preconditions: The dashboard reads an approved registry snapshot only.
Compatibility rules are source-versioned and validated before display.
No private results or credentials enter the visualization.
failure_cases: A stale inventory drives unavailable-field planning.
A dashboard presents incompatible settings as selectable.
A local data store becomes a bypass around registry governance.
security_risk: The source includes direct access and local database setup; those implementation details are excluded.
recommended_pattern: Build read-only planning views from the versioned registry snapshot, label source freshness and prevent invalid profile combinations from entering CandidatePlan.
local_validation_needed: Test snapshot expiry and profile constraint filtering with synthetic data.
Verify dashboard rendering cannot reveal private candidate or account data.

problem: A research assistant becomes the scheduler or execution authority in a continuous Alpha pipeline.
observed_pattern: A Pipeline MCP architecture separates research skills from workflow control, feedback and recovery. The source's platform-facing automation is prohibited, while its control-plane separation reinforces a safe staged system design.
preconditions: Candidate planning, hard admission, scheduling and execution are separate modules.
Every transition has an audit record and a bounded budget.
Research tools have no direct adapter capability.
failure_cases: Agent feedback changes budgets or admission criteria.
A proposed candidate is executed without a human-authorized gate.
Recovery treats ambiguous states as success.
security_risk: Forum control-plane examples include direct platform actions and cannot be adopted as executable code.
recommended_pattern: Keep MCP, skills and RAG on the advisory side. A deterministic control plane owns candidate states, budgets, retries, recovery and adapter invocation.
local_validation_needed: Test a mock parent-child recovery state machine.
Verify an assistant cannot invoke an adapter or modify budget state.
Audit all transitions under synthetic failure modes.

problem: Genius, Pyramid or point-tower discussions turn operator-count tactics into a promotion policy.
observed_pattern: A detailed community post links personal operator-count experiments, Pyramid ideas and Genius discussion. Its numerical targets, counting behavior and correlation stories are practitioner observations rather than official mechanics.
preconditions: Current official Genius and Pyramid definitions are captured.
Any private expression analysis stays local and human-reviewed.
failure_cases: Operator manipulation substitutes for economic novelty.
Forum tactics are used to set promotion or admission targets.
One correlation anecdote becomes a portfolio-wide rule.
security_risk: Source material can expose private expressions, candidate results and account progression; none is retained publicly.
recommended_pattern: Treat operator-count and point-tower discussion as a research-review prompt only. Keep promotion logic, accounting and any account action outside AI and automation pending official evidence.
local_validation_needed: Obtain current official Genius and Pyramid documentation.
Validate dependency counts with a private parser but do not score a user from forum claims.
Separate diversity hypotheses from eligibility mechanics.

problem: A high single-candidate score or a personal Value-Factor narrative is mistaken for a portable submission or portfolio rule.
observed_pattern: Two practitioner retrospectives favor economic logic, robustness, data-family diversity and lower correlation risk, while reporting personal outcomes and opinions. They support a structured research-review checklist only, not a threshold or platform-selection rule.
preconditions: A CandidatePlan has a stated economic hypothesis and current profile snapshot.
Correlation kinds and quality dimensions remain separately named.
failure_cases: Personal score or turnover bands become hard admission policy.
Diversity language is treated as proof of low Self, Power Pool or Prod correlation.
A portfolio narrative overrides current official requirements.
security_risk: Private outcomes, candidate records and account-scoring observations must stay local and outside AI prompts.
recommended_pattern: Capture mechanism, data-family role, profile scope, simplicity concern and correlation hypothesis as advisory review fields. Route all eligibility and real actions through verified rules and the normal gates.
local_validation_needed: Define reviewer agreement for advisory quality fields.
Measure whether a diversity label predicts any approved local outcome without publishing account data.
Confirm current official submission requirements separately.

problem: An AI assistant is given raw expressions, private IDs, account results or an autonomous optimization mandate.
observed_pattern: Forum workflows use assistants to group fields into economic roles, explain metadata and propose research variations, but their prompts also include content and authority that cannot cross the Alpha Mining OS boundary.
preconditions: Only approved registry facts and role placeholders are provided.
The assistant has no adapter, scheduler, budget or account capability.
failure_cases: AI receives raw expression, account metric or identifier.
Generated variation bypasses static validation or hard admission.
A broad prompt turns a hypothesis search into unbounded batch creation.
security_risk: Forum prompts can contain private identifiers and direct automation instructions; public assets retain neither.
recommended_pattern: Use the assistant for bounded role classification, research-note drafting and mutation hypotheses. Convert any output into a redacted CandidatePlan that must pass deterministic review.
local_validation_needed: Test prompt redaction against synthetic sensitive values.
Measure duplicate and invalid-plan rates under a bounded mock queue.
Review an assistant output sample for unsupported factual claims.

problem: A FastExpr research idea is represented in Python without proving history, state, missingness, numeric or resource semantics.
observed_pattern: Conversion and store discussions identify nested time-series history, state carryover, numeric representation, missing values and compute cost as separate reasons a Python result can diverge or fail.
preconditions: A private semantic contract names required field types, history and state.
An offline harness exists for representative missingness and warm-up cases.
failure_cases: Mechanical operator-name translation is accepted as semantic parity.
State is simulated through unbounded recomputation.
A runtime error is interpreted as a signal-quality result.
security_risk: Source code and platform-specific invocation details are non-adoptable and excluded.
recommended_pattern: Create a private conversion casebook with semantic assumptions, resource estimate, fixture outcomes and unresolved differences. Allow only a reviewed normalized CandidatePlan to move downstream.
local_validation_needed: Build synthetic state-history and missing-data fixtures.
Set bounded offline resource tests.
Compare current official documentation before accepting any operator mapping.

problem: Manual and tool-assisted research paths duplicate work or lose track of pending, errored and recovered candidates.
observed_pattern: A forum backtest-ledger MVP separates candidate canonicalization, duplicate detection and lifecycle records. The general pattern is a durable private ledger, not its direct platform interaction.
preconditions: A deterministic private fingerprint and profile hash exist.
The ledger is behind the scheduler and has an audit record.
failure_cases: Whitespace-only comparison creates false misses.
A failed external action is marked complete locally.
The ledger becomes an alternate execution path.
security_risk: Do not store raw Alpha expressions, platform IDs, results, credentials or request payloads in public assets.
recommended_pattern: Use create-or-return records, distinct lifecycle states and immutable source references. Treat ambiguous or missing external states as UNKNOWN until an approved reconciliation occurs.
local_validation_needed: Test canonicalization with synthetic equivalent and non-equivalent inputs.
Inject retry, restart and partial-result failures.
Verify recovery cannot invoke an adapter without normal admission.

problem: Batch research generates many candidates without bounded queue ownership, provenance or error separation.
observed_pattern: Forum batch workflows describe idea-to-code-to-audit loops and machine-readable candidate batches, but include non-adoptable direct execution material. The reusable pattern is a bounded research queue whose artifacts normalize before scheduling.
preconditions: A bounded batch budget and candidate schema are approved.
Every generated item is deduplicated and statically reviewed before any downstream action.
failure_cases: Generated batch is assumed novel because its text differs.
The generator owns retries or direct platform access.
Pending infrastructure work is collapsed into a candidate-quality failure.
security_risk: Batch examples may contain direct platform calls, code and private values; none is reused.
recommended_pattern: Keep generation, static validation, hard admission, scheduling and result reconciliation as separate stateful stages with immutable handoffs.
local_validation_needed: Run a mock batch through duplicate, invalid, throttled and restart cases.
Verify no generation worker can mutate budgets or execution state.
Inspect queue depth and cancellation behavior under a bounded load.

problem: Operator-count reduction is mistaken for a promotion tactic or changes a hypothesis invisibly.
observed_pattern: A simplification discussion treats excessive nesting and defensive transformations as review risks. It supports a semantics-preserving simplification review, not a target operator count or a performance promise.
preconditions: The original economic hypothesis is recorded.
A private dependency manifest and semantic comparison are available.
failure_cases: Removing a guard changes missing-value or denominator behavior.
Lower operator count becomes a substitute for validation.
A forum simplifier is executed against private research material without review.
security_risk: Source skill text and private expressions are excluded from public artifacts.
recommended_pattern: Treat simplification as a proposed mutation with explicit before/after semantics, dependency delta and offline comparison. Keep complexity as review metadata only.
local_validation_needed: Create synthetic cases for missingness and boundary behavior.
Require reviewer approval of semantic deltas.
Confirm supported operators from the current registry snapshot.

problem: Advanced numerical transformations are treated as portable Alpha templates without coverage, compute and robustness evidence.
observed_pattern: Python posts explore distributional and frequency-domain transformations, but reported successes are private, scoped and dependent on implementation details. They are research ideas, not reusable production templates.
preconditions: A clear economic hypothesis exists before choosing a transformation.
Resource and data-quality checks are part of the private plan.
failure_cases: A mathematical transform replaces economic justification.
Compute-heavy code is queued without bounded resource evidence.
Reported private success is generalized across datasets or regions.
security_risk: No source code, exact fields, formulas or private results are published.
recommended_pattern: Store numerical methods as hypothesis tags with explicit data-shape, stability and resource-review requirements. Promote only after a controlled private experiment and normal gates.
local_validation_needed: Test determinism, numerical stability and missingness behavior with synthetic data.
Set a private resource ceiling before any approved experiment.
Compare simple baseline and transformed variants under the same scope.

problem: VF, payment, PPA and Osmosis narratives are converted into promotion, reward or allocation logic.
observed_pattern: Recent discussion contains personal observations and a time-scoped activity announcement. Neither establishes a durable reward formula, eligibility threshold, allocation rule or automated account action.
preconditions: Current official terms are separately captured.
Any account action has explicit human approval.
failure_cases: Personal payment or VF stories become a research objective.
A campaign announcement is treated as a permanent mechanism.
Automation writes tags or allocation based on a narrative.
security_risk: Account rewards, rank, allocation and private performance are sensitive and excluded.
recommended_pattern: Record these sources as time-bounded manual-review alerts only. Keep them outside admission, scheduler, scoring, budget and account-write paths.
local_validation_needed: Obtain current official terms for each program.
Test no account-write capability is exposed to research agents.
Review campaign expiry and scope before relying on any factual statement.

problem: Community session and retry wrappers are copied into a research client, bringing hidden authentication, renewal or retry authority with them.
observed_pattern: Two code posts centralize session handling, request retries and historical result storage. Their direct access implementation is prohibited, but they show why retry classification, idempotency and durable local lifecycle data belong in a single approved adapter boundary.
preconditions: An explicit API Gate and human-authorized adapter exist.
Authentication is injected only by the controlled environment, never stored in code or research artifacts.
failure_cases: A generic retry wrapper silently renews access or repeats a non-idempotent action.
Historical storage contains raw request payloads, results or credentials.
Business logic owns retry cadence rather than the shared scheduler.
security_risk: Source code includes direct platform access and storage patterns; no endpoint, credential, account or result content is retained.
recommended_pattern: Use opaque error classes, idempotency keys, bounded retries and private audit pointers in one deterministic adapter. Fail closed for authentication, ambiguous submission and unknown external state.
local_validation_needed: Exercise mock auth-expired, rate-limited, timeout and malformed-response paths.
Verify retries are disallowed for non-idempotent or ambiguous actions.
Audit storage schemas for raw payload and credential exclusion.

problem: A strong in-sample result is accepted without a scoped, reproducible robustness review.
observed_pattern: A forum analysis argues for comparing grouped out-of-sample distributions rather than relying on one best point estimate. The durable lesson is evidence structure and provenance, not its private analysis or any acceptance threshold.
preconditions: Authorized results exist in a private audit store.
Comparison scope, window and coverage are explicitly versioned.
failure_cases: An aggregate hides a narrow regional or timing failure.
A result snapshot is presented without scope or coverage metadata.
A robustness view leaks account data or is treated as an official platform gate.
security_risk: Source includes prohibited access and result material; public assets retain only the review pattern.
recommended_pattern: Create a private robustness-review record with profile, window, coverage, distribution summary reference and unresolved limitations. Keep it advisory and separate from official checks.
local_validation_needed: Define synthetic stable and unstable fixture groups.
Review visibility rules for result aggregates.
Confirm no local review changes admission or execution authority.

problem: A forum-reported daily simulation count or client-side stop threshold becomes scheduler capacity or reset logic.
observed_pattern: Two practitioner posts reserve a personal request budget and use a local stop mechanism. They are useful only as evidence that internal budget control and durable interruption states matter; they do not prove platform capacity or quota semantics.
preconditions: Current official capacity semantics are independently captured.
Any internal budget is clearly labelled local and non-authoritative.
failure_cases: A claimed reset time or remaining capacity is hard-coded.
A client-side stop is treated as evidence that a platform request was cancelled.
A scheduler retries unknown actions after a local process stop.
security_risk: The sources include direct request and process-control code; no implementation detail is adopted.
recommended_pattern: Use a local budget ceiling and a fail-closed UNKNOWN state as safety mechanisms only. Reconcile capacity or result state only through an approved, authorized observation path.
local_validation_needed: Test local budget exhaustion and restart with mock records.
Verify no unknown request is retried automatically.
Capture current official quota and reset wording before configuration.

problem: Multi-agent or Skill workflows share raw context, retain unbounded memory or let research tools call execution directly.
observed_pattern: Forum examples separate generation, review, reusable Skills, knowledge lookup and experiment recording, but also include direct platform access. The reusable structure is bounded, redacted handoff between advisory roles and a deterministic control plane.
preconditions: Each role receives only sanctioned metadata and bounded context.
Review output is stored as a draft, not an execution command.
failure_cases: A reviewer sees credentials, raw expressions or private results.
A memory cache is used as an unversioned authority.
A research Skill invokes a scheduler or adapter directly.
security_risk: Community examples include direct access and private workflow material; source code and prompts are excluded.
recommended_pattern: Use role-scoped inputs, private provenance records and deterministic normalized handoffs. A separate review role may flag unsafe plans but cannot approve execution or change budgets.
local_validation_needed: Run context-redaction tests with synthetic secrets and private expressions.
Test role isolation and denied adapter access.
Measure restart recovery when a research worker fails mid-plan.

problem: Research attempts become unrecoverable after a context or process interruption.
observed_pattern: A code-bearing post proposes a human-readable structured record for an origin, variants, outcome classes, and next steps. The reusable part is provenance and lineage; source expressions, settings, identifiers, metrics, and results are excluded.
preconditions: A private CandidatePlan and versioned registry snapshot exist.
Public review artifacts contain only redacted roles and outcome classes.
failure_cases: Schema changes without versioning.
Raw expressions or results leak into review records.
A narrative outcome is treated as an admission decision.
security_risk: The source contains direct candidate identities, formulas, settings, and performance records; none may enter public or external-AI context.
recommended_pattern: Use an append-only private ResearchLedger with origin fingerprint, variant relation, private audit pointer, decision reason, and terminal state. Publish only a sanitized claim and source locator.
local_validation_needed: Test crash/resume and duplicate-write recovery.
Review the public projection against redaction fixtures.

problem: Template families consume research budget without measured lineage or retirement criteria.
observed_pattern: A forum author reports grouping generated candidates by source template, tagging origin, and periodically retiring low-yield groups. The report does not prove transferable yield, daily capacity, or an automatic deletion rule.
preconditions: A private template-family identifier exists before generation.
Outcome states are reconciled through an approved local ledger.
failure_cases: A small sample retires a potentially useful family.
Personal reported throughput becomes a platform budget assumption.
Unsafe source generation code is copied.
security_risk: The source includes code and personal research results; no executable generator, formula, result, or account detail is adopted.
recommended_pattern: Track family-level counts for proposed, invalid, duplicate, locally reviewed, and manually retained candidates. Make retirement a reversible human-reviewed research decision.
local_validation_needed: Define a minimum private sample and observation window.
Measure whether family labels improve local research diversity without excluding novel hypotheses.

problem: Field format ambiguity can create low-information or semantically duplicate candidate variants.
observed_pattern: A high-vote practitioner post hypothesizes that some vector-labelled fields behave like single-valued matrices, making several transformations nearly redundant. This is a scoped empirical observation, not a cross-dataset rule.
preconditions: An approved registry exposes type and scope metadata.
Any sample-cardinality check is private, authorized, and versioned.
failure_cases: A label or limited sample is mistaken for stable field semantics.
A candidate family is excluded without economic review.
Direct data scraping replaces registry validation.
security_risk: The observation can tempt unsanctioned field inspection; public assets retain no field names, values, or sampling code.
recommended_pattern: Treat field type, cardinality, coverage, and operator compatibility as private preflight evidence. Flag likely redundant variants for review rather than automatically rejecting them.
local_validation_needed: Compare metadata claims with approved sample summaries across scope and time.
Record false-positive and false-negative redundancy flags.

problem: Workers cannot safely pause, resume, or reconcile when control intent lives only inside a running process.
observed_pattern: A community implementation separates a shared control record from computation workers so desired stop and concurrency settings can survive worker changes. Its process manager, network exposure, and credential-like configuration are non-adoptable.
preconditions: One local scheduler owns lifecycle transitions.
Workers have opaque task identities and durable heartbeats.
failure_cases: Stale desired state is applied after ownership changes.
A worker assumes an external action stopped without reconciliation.
A control surface exposes network or secret material.
security_risk: The source includes direct process and network control details; do not copy its transport, port, authentication, or execution logic.
recommended_pattern: Use scheduler-owned durable intent, lease, heartbeat, and reconciliation records. Worker processes only observe assigned state and return opaque transitions.
local_validation_needed: Test restart, orphaned worker, duplicate lease, and unknown external-state fixtures.
Review controller storage against least-privilege boundaries.

problem: Unbounded worker fan-out can cause throttling and ambiguous infrastructure outcomes.
observed_pattern: Community code reports a concurrent-request throttle after broad fan-out, while another code post advocates delayed polling. Neither gives an authoritative capacity, scope, or retry contract.

applicability.Alpha_type: future authorized adapter and offline queue tests

preconditions: One scheduler owns concurrency and retry eligibility.
Infrastructure states are stored independently from candidate quality.
failure_cases: Independent workers retry together.
A throttle becomes a permanent failure or a guessed capacity number.
Direct session code bypasses the approved adapter.
security_risk: Both sources contain direct platform and session patterns that are prohibited from use or publication.
recommended_pattern: Use a shared bounded queue, leases, server-guidance parsing, jittered retry eligibility, and an explicit THROTTLED or UNKNOWN state. Do not encode source wait values or capacity claims.
local_validation_needed: Exercise 429, pending, timeout, and ambiguous-release mocks.
Establish any future budget only through a separately approved read-only harness.

problem: Local correlation utilities can create a false monotonic funnel rule.
observed_pattern: A direct-access local utility reports a self and Power Pool-style observation that does not match a presumed monotonic ordering. The code, account retrieval, and output are non-adoptable; the report is counterevidence only.
preconditions: An approved future read path can produce paired observations with identical profile and observed-at metadata.
No admission or priority policy depends on an ordering heuristic.
failure_cases: Pool identity or observation time differs across values.
A local display value is treated as an official correlation definition.
An anecdote becomes a screening cutoff.
security_risk: The source exposes direct authentication and private candidate retrieval patterns; do not copy, run, or publish it.
recommended_pattern: Do not adopt the utility. Retain a paired-observation matrix with relation direction, missingness, profile version, and source freshness, then assess reversals privately.
local_validation_needed: Collect authorized paired observations segmented by scope.
Measure ordering rate and disagreement rate before any optional prioritization experiment.

problem: Long-running research can flood an LLM context with raw results and lose recoverability after interruption.
observed_pattern: A wrapper post separates private raw outputs and progress logs from compact decision summaries. Its direct simulation integration and example result data are excluded, but the artifact-projection boundary is reusable.
preconditions: A human-approved task owns any future real adapter.
Raw material is private and a sanitized summary schema exists.
failure_cases: A summary is stale, incomplete, or treated as the source of truth.
Raw account results or expressions leak into an AI prompt.
A wrapper retries a non-idempotent external action.
security_risk: The source describes direct platform calls and result fields. No payload, identifier, result, or execution code is retained.
recommended_pattern: Write immutable private raw artifacts and progress audit records, then project a bounded redacted decision summary for research review. The summary cannot submit, modify, or reopen a task.
local_validation_needed: Test crash recovery between raw write and summary materialization.
Review prompt payloads against redaction and token-budget fixtures.

problem: Execution-capable WQ command tooling can bypass governance and expose high-risk account operations.
